steps.title: Support the time comparison
steps.content: The claim compares how long people view art in two settings: in a museum and online. Direct support must give viewing-time evidence for both settings, not facts about the artist, visitors, or collections.

steps.title: Remove irrelevant evidence
steps.content: Choice B only says another Lawrence work is online. Choice C describes museum visitors' origins. Choice D says multiple museums own Lawrence works. None of those measure viewing duration in museums versus online. The answer is A.
